payload.summary: All three amendments verified against actual source code. Amendment fr-12-cda1336a identifies a confirmed missing terminal guard in the Some(creation_hash) branch of safe_plan_hash_backfill (fs.rs:2637-2646) — the None branch at line 2653 has the guard but the Some branch does not. Amendment fr-12-589cc81f correctly identifies that deny_unknown_fields on StartJournalDetails (model.rs:377) and CompletionJournalDetails (model.rs:412) blocks forward-compatible journal repair, with the code comments themselves acknowledging this limitation. Amendment fr-12-cf3e1d18 traces the full call path showing terminal replays reach the unguarded backfill via merge_attempt_entries copying snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation (model.rs:328-330) and update_task_run calling safe_plan_hash_backfill inside the terminal branch (fs.rs:3379).

votes.rationale: Verified in source: safe_plan_hash_backfill (fs.rs:2628-2667) has an asymmetric terminal guard. The None branch at line 2653 correctly checks entry.outcome.is_terminal() before backfilling, but the Some(creation_hash) branch at lines 2637-2646 unconditionally sets entry.plan_hash = Some(creation_hash.clone()) when the snapshot hash matches, with no terminal check. A terminal entry with snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation = Some(X) and plan_hash = None will be incorrectly backfilled, violating the contract that terminal replays must not auto-populate plan_hash. The fix (hoist the terminal guard before the match, or add it to the Some branch) is straightforward and correct.

Verified: both StartJournalDetails (model.rs:377) and CompletionJournalDetails (model.rs:412) have #[serde(deny_unknown_fields)]. The code comments at lines 370-375 and 403-410 explicitly document the consequence: an older binary encountering unknown fields will fail deserialization, parse() returns None, journal merge is skipped, and a duplicate event is appended. The merge implementations (fs.rs:2338-2364 and 2381-2407) use json_fill_none with documented INVARIANT comments acknowledging that new fields with conflict semantics must have manual option_conflicts checks added. While the current behavior is data-safe (no corruption), forward-compatible deserialization was a requirement of the prior amendment, and this gap — duplicate journal entries on binary downgrade, plus the reliance on manual enumeration for conflict fields — remains unaddressed.

Verified the full call path: (1) merge_attempt_entries at model.rs:328-330 copies snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation from secondary to merged entry when primary is None; (2) update_task_run enters the terminal branch at fs.rs:3347 when entry.outcome.is_terminal(); (3) inside that branch, safe_plan_hash_backfill is called at fs.rs:3379 (comment says 'Safe plan_hash backfill for terminal replay as well'); (4) the Some(creation_hash) branch at fs.rs:2637-2642 lacks the terminal guard (same root bug as fr-12-cda1336a). This traces the complete trigger path: terminal replay → merge copies snapshot_plan_hash_at_creation → backfill mutates plan_hash from None to snapshot hash on an already-finalized row. While sharing the root cause with fr-12-cda1336a, this amendment valuably documents the upstream call path and confirms the merge propagation vector.
